name: createFacebookAdSet
description: Creates a new ad set in a Facebook campaign. IMPORTANT: This requires a specific workflow: First use listAccounts to select an ad account. Then create a campaign using createFacebookAdCampaign. Only after both steps are completed, proceed with ad set creation. Do not attempt to create an ad set without completing these steps in order.

ad_account_id.description: The ID of the ad account. MUST be obtained first through listAccounts command before attempting campaign creation.

campaign_id.description: Must be obtained first through the create campaign command before attempting ad set creation.

name.description: Name of the ad set. Should be descriptive and include target audience characteristics.

daily_budget.description: Daily budget in the smallest unit of the currency (e.g., cents). For example, $10 = 1000.

start_time.description: The start time in ISO 8601 format. Should match or be after campaign start time.

end_time.description: The end time in ISO 8601 format. Should match or be before campaign end time.

age_min.description: Minimum age for targeting. Must be between 13 and 65.

age_max.description: Maximum age for targeting. Must be between 13 and 65. Use 65 for '65 and older'.

genders.description: Array of gender values to target. Must contain at least one value: [1] for men only, [2] for women only, [1,2] for all genders.

countries.description: Array of two-letter country codes to target (e.g., ['ID'] for Indonesia). Each code must be exactly 2 characters.
